arts.ttl: Napoli’s Victory Over Atalanta: Conte Reflects on Team Growth and Future Plans
arts.sum: Antonio Conte celebrated a thrilling 3-2 victory for Napoli against Atalanta, a crucial match that solidified their position at the top of the Serie A standings. After the game, Conte shared his thoughts with Sky, emphasizing the growth of his team despite facing challenges. arts.ttl: Napoli underlines Serie A title chance with comeback victory over Atalanta
arts.sum: Tim Weah scored against his father’s former club as Juventus beat AC Milan 2-0 to inflict Sérgio Conceição’s first loss as the Rossoneri coach. Antonio Conte’s side won 3-2 at Atalanta, which hadn’t lost since September, and moved six points clear of second-placed Inter Milan.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Atalanta 2-3 Napoli: Match Report
arts.sum: Napoli made a significant advancement in their quest for the Scudetto with a thrilling 3-2 victory over Atalanta. The match showcased goals from Matteo Politano, Scott McTominay, and Romelu Lukaku, effectively ending Atalanta's impressive unbeaten streak.
